changes.old_value:
Welcome to Hinge, the dating app designed to be deleted


Welcome to Hinge, the online dating app for people who want to go on their last first date. With profiles and prompts that show your personality through text, photos, video, and voice, you have unique conversations that lead to great dates. And it’s working. Currently, people on Hinge go on a date every three seconds. Additionally, in 2022, we were the fastest-growing dating app in the US, UK, and Canada.

Hinge is built on the belief that anyone looking for meaningful connections should be able to find it. By inspiring intimate, in-person connections, we aim to create a less lonely world. With detailed profiles, meaningful likes and a nobel-prize winning algorithm, dating & relationships are at the core of everything we do.

Hinge is about fostering real relationships built on compatibility and intention. By encouraging thoughtful interactions and helping daters express who they truly are, Hinge makes it easier to find matches who share the same values, goals, and relationship intentions. Whether you’re looking for love or a lasting relationship, every feature is designed to move you beyond casual chats and into meaningful connections that lead to something real.

Hinge is helping to make queer dating a safe space, with LGBTQIA+–specific prompts and a Match Note feature that lets you share information with your date before they match with you. Our safety centre also allows you to block offensive language from incoming likes, and we’ll automatically hide comments we think could be disrespectful—so you can focus on finding great connections.

HOW WE GET YOU OFF HINGE
When it comes to online dating, people are so busy matching that they’re not always connecting, in person, where it counts. Hinge is on a mission to change that. Our goal is to help you go on your last first date, so we built Hinge, the app that’s designed to be deleted. Here’s how:

💌 We quickly learn your type. Tell us your relationship type and dating preferences so that we can help introduce the best people to you.

💗We give you a sense of someone’s personality. You’ll get to know potential dates through their unique answers to prompts, as well as information like religion, height, politics, dating intentions, relationship type, and much more.

💘We make it easy to start a conversation. Every match begins with someone liking or commenting on a specific part of your profile.

🫶We want you to feel confident about meeting people in person and going on great dates. Selfie Verification makes it easier for daters on Hinge to ensure that they are who they say they are.

❤️We ask how your dates are going. After exchanging phone numbers with a Match, we’ll follow up to hear how your date went so we can make better recommendations.

PRESS
◼ "It's the go-to dating app for many people looking for love." - The Daily Mail
◼ “Hinge’s CEO says a good dating app relies on vulnerability, not algorithms.” - Washington Post
◼ "Hinge is the first dating app to actually measure real-world success" - TechCrunch


Daters looking to see everyone who likes them or send unlimited likes can upgrade to Hinge+. To access additional features, including enhanced recommendations and priority likes, we offer HingeX.

SUBSCRIPTION INFO
➕ Payment will be charged to your selected payment method at confirmation of purchase
➕ Subscription automatically renews before your next billing date unless auto-renew is turned off
➕ Account will be charged for renewal at the same price and duration prior to the end of the current period
➕ Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to Account Settings after purchase

Support: hello@hinge.co
Terms of Service: https://hinge.co/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://hinge.co/privacy.html

All photos are of models and used for illustrative purposes only.

When it comes to online dating, people are so busy matching that they’re not always connecting, in person, where it counts. Hinge is on a mission to change that. Our goal is to help you go on your last first date, so we built Hinge, the app that’s designed to be deleted. Here’s how:

💌 We quickly learn your type. Tell us your relationship type and dating preferences so that we can help introduce the best people to you.

💗We give you a sense of someone’s personality. You’ll get to know potential dates through their unique answers to prompts, as well as information like religion, height, politics, dating intentions, relationship type, and much more.

💘 Every match begins with someone liking or commenting on a specific part of your profile. Our latest feature, Convo Starters, offers personalized ideas inspired from someone’s Prompt answers and photos to help you spark engaging conversations from the start.

🫶We want you to feel confident about meeting people in person and going on great dates. Selfie Verification makes it easier for daters on Hinge to ensure that they are who they say they are.

❤️We ask how your dates are going. After exchanging phone numbers with a Match, we’ll follow up to hear how your date went so we can make better recommendations.

PRESS
◼ "It's the go-to dating app for many people looking for love." - The Daily Mail
◼ “Hinge’s CEO says a good dating app relies on vulnerability, not algorithms.” - Washington Post
◼ "Hinge is the first dating app to actually measure real-world success" - TechCrunch


Daters looking to see everyone who likes them or send unlimited likes can upgrade to Hinge+. To access additional features, including enhanced recommendations and priority likes, we offer HingeX.

SUBSCRIPTION INFO
➕ Payment will be charged to your selected payment method at confirmation of purchase
➕ Subscription automatically renews before your next billing date unless auto-renew is turned off
➕ Account will be charged for renewal at the same price and duration prior to the end of the current period
➕ Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to Account Settings after purchase

Support: hello@hinge.co
Terms of Service: https://hinge.co/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://hinge.co/privacy.html

All photos are of models and used for illustrative purposes only.

changes.old_value:
Welcome to Hinge, the online dating app designed to be deleted


Welcome to Hinge, the online dating app for people who want to go on their last first date. With profiles and prompts that show your personality through text, photos, video, and voice, you have unique conversations that lead to great dates. Additionally, in 2022, we were the fastest-growing dating app in the US, UK, and Canada.

Hinge is built on the belief that anyone looking for meaningful connections should be able to find it. By inspiring intimate, in-person connections, we aim to create a less lonely world. With detailed profiles, meaningful likes and a nobel-prize winning algorithm, dating & relationships are at the core of everything we do.

Hinge is about fostering real relationships built on compatibility and intention. By encouraging thoughtful interactions and helping daters express who they truly are, Hinge makes it easier to find matches who share the same values, goals, and relationship intentions. Whether you’re looking for love or a lasting relationship, every feature is designed to move you beyond casual chats and into meaningful connections that lead to something real.

Hinge is helping to make queer dating a safe space, with LGBTQIA+ specific prompts and a Match Note feature that lets you share information with your date before they match with you. Our safety centre also allows you to block offensive language from incoming likes, and we’ll automatically hide comments we think could be disrespectful.

HOW WE GET YOU OFF HINGE
When it comes to online dating, people are so busy matching that they’re not always connecting, in person, where it counts. Hinge is on a mission to change that. Our goal is to help you go on your last first date, so we built Hinge, the app that’s designed to be deleted. Here’s how:

💘 Every match begins with someone liking or commenting on a specific part of your profile. Our latest feature, Convo Starters, offers personalized ideas inspired from someone’s Prompt answers and photos to help you spark engaging conversations from the start.

🫶We want you to feel confident about meeting people in person and going on great dates. Selfie Verification makes it easier for daters on Hinge to ensure that they are who they say they are.

❤️We ask how your dates are going. After exchanging phone numbers with a Match, we’ll follow up to hear how your date went so we can make better recommendations.
